scripts.dev: sh -c 'cd humanizer-engine/frontend && if [ ! -d node_modules ]; then npm install; fi && npm run dev -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-${npm_config_port:-3000}}'
scripts.build: cd humanizer-engine/frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.postinstall: cd humanizer-engine/frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
